signals.headline: Grayscale Ethereum Staking ETF Launches on NYSE Arca with $120M Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Grayscale Ethereum Staking ETF Launches on NYSE Arca with $120M Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Grayscale's Ethereum Staking ETF launched on NYSE Arca on April 6, 2026, introducing first-of-its-kind delayed delivery liquidity for staked assets and drawing $120 million in inflows on April 7—the quarter's strongest single-day figure—signaling robust institutional demand amid ETH's price pullback
